title: The Agentic Future
concept: Agentic loops represent the next frontier, shifting AI from a text writing assistant to an autonomous task execution engine. Boss explain ends with: 'Next up: The LLM Capstone.'

exercises.prompt: Which task requires an AI to behave like an agent rather than just a chatbot?

options.text: Planning, researching, and booking a vacation automatically

exercises.explain: Standard AI assistants wait for your next prompt to do anything new, whereas agentic loops can run multiple steps on their own.

cards.title: Beyond Simple Chat
cards.body: Right now, you type a prompt and the AI immediately gives you an answer. But what if the AI could work for hours on a complex task—searching the web, testing its own work, and fixing its mistakes—before showing you the final result? Welcome to the agentic future.

cards.title: What is an Agentic Loop?
cards.body: An agentic loop is a system where an AI agent works in a continuous cycle: it sets a goal, makes a plan, runs actions using digital tools, observes the results, and corrects its own mistakes until the task is successfully completed.

cards.title: The Chef Analogy
cards.body: Think of a regular AI assistant like a recipe writer. It can write down the steps to bake a cake, but you have to do all the work. An agentic loop is like a robot chef in your kitchen. It reads the recipe, checks your fridge, goes shopping if you're missing eggs, bakes the cake, and tastes it to make sure it's perfect before serving.

cards.title: Agentic Travel Agent
cards.body: Imagine asking an AI to 'find and book the cheapest flight to New York next Tuesday.' A normal AI gives you a list of flight websites. An agentic AI uses web-browsing tools, searches multiple airlines, compares prices, handles errors if a page doesn't load, selects the best flight, and books it for you.

cards.title: Are Agents Unstoppable?
cards.body: Many believe AI agents are already perfect and run completely on their own without risk. In reality, agentic loops can get stuck in endless repetitions (infinite loops) or go off-track, which is why developers build guardrails to keep them safe and efficient.

cards.title: The Shift in Control
cards.body: See how the user interaction changes when moving from standard AI to agentic loops.

right.text: Goal -> Plan -> Action -> Check -> Final Result. The AI loops autonomously until the task is done.

left.text: Prompt -> Direct Answer. You do all the work of checking, correcting, and taking action yourself.

exercises.prompt: What makes an agentic AI system different from a standard chat assistant?

options.text: It answers questions faster than standard AI.
It can plan, use tools, and fix its own mistakes to reach a goal.
It does not use a large language model.
It only works when a human guides every action.

exercises.explain: Traditional AI chats respond instantly to a single prompt, whereas an agentic AI works in a loop of planning, acting, and self-correction to complete a larger goal.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Agentic systems can check their own work and correct errors during execution.
exercises.explain: Agentic loops allow the AI to notice if an action failed, adjust its strategy, and try a different approach to finish the job.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word to complete how agentic loops interact with the digital world.
exercises.sentence: Agentic loops achieve goals by choosing and using digital write-only or read-only tools to complete tasks.
exercises.explain: To act in the real world, agentic loops use tools like web browsers, code runners, or database access.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following describes an AI acting in an agentic loop?

options.text: An AI translation tool that translates a sentence from Spanish to English instantly.
An AI support agent that looks up a customer's order, detects a delivery error, and automatically issues a refund.
A smart keyboard that suggests the next word you want to type.

exercises.explain: The customer service agent is acting autonomously by using a tool (database lookup) and resolving a customer's specific problem without human intervention.

exercises.prompt: Why are agentic loops considered the next frontier in AI development?

options.text: They make AI models write replies faster
They only allow AI to chat with humans
They allow AI to plan, use tools, and correct its own mistakes to finish a job
They completely replace the need for LLMs

exercises.explain: Agentic loops give AI the freedom to execute, self-correct, and complete complex multi-step tasks without needing a human to guide every single step. Next up: The LLM Capstone.
